text: Day 65 of Middle East conflict — Trump says US having ‘very positive discussions’ with Iran - CNN
fullText: President Donald Trump said his representatives are having “positive discussions” with Iran as the two countries trade peace proposals. Meanwhile, the average cost of gas in the US rose to $4.45 a gallon.

text: Meme stock GameStop makes $56 billion bid for eBay in bid to rival Amazon - CNBC
fullText: GameStop made a takeover bid for eBay, offering $125 per share in a cash-and-stock deal that values the e-commerce platform at roughly $55.5 billion.

text: What to know about hantavirus - NBC News
fullText: The virus that is believed to be responsible for the deaths of three people and the illnesses of three others aboard a cruise ship over the weekend is a relatively rare but devastating threat without a vaccine, treatment or cure.

text: Tobias Harris, Pistons bury Magic in Game 7, 116-94, to complete 3-1 comeback - Detroit Free Press
fullText: Tobias Harris and Cade Cunningham combined to pour in 62 points in Game 7 vs Orlando Magic for Detroit Pistons' first playoff series win in 18 years.

text: Cavaliers close out Raptors in Game 7, advance to face Pistons - ESPN
fullText: Jarrett Allen tied his playoff career high with 22 points and grabbed 19 rebounds as the Cavaliers advanced to the Eastern Conference semifinals with a 114-102 victory over the Raptors in Game 7 of their series Sunday night.

text: United flight landing at Newark Liberty Airport strikes light pole, truck on New Jersey Turnpike, officials say - CBS News
fullText: An investigation is underway after a United Airlines plane struck a light pole and truck on the New Jersey Turnpike as it was coming in for a landing at Newark Liberty Airport on Sunday afternoon, officials said.
